verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives bottom line, "image is a static template; a container is a running instance"; B delays with "related but distinct concepts."
verdict.decisiveness: A: keeps one mental model and one concrete test; B adds multiple analogies, "recipe / class blueprint" and "cooked meal / built house."
verdict.actionability: A: easiest to verify immediately: "docker pull ubuntu" then "docker run ubuntu" three times gives "three independent containers."
